Thank you for everything!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Linda Gutri","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWbRnfJAv4DjyrwEkN0VuNKD4CPnzWPafr8Zo5sqCEDm2Q7G5_s=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"When the Niagara Roof Masters salesman was gone and for the rest of the day, I was cursing myself for being an easy sell. I was told by a house inspector my roof renewal would cost $6,000 at today's prices. The final bill with Niagara Roof Masters was to be more than double what I was expecting. I had found roofers who would do my job for $4,600. But the Niagara Roof Masters salesman took my adult son on the roof and my son saw rotten wood under the shingles plus what looked like 2x4s holding the shingles. It's no wonder shingles had been blown away by wind and there were patches of fixes all over the place. Niagara tore all that out and put on plywood and a breathable underlayment to prevent rot from moisture. Plus they put on peel & stick underlayment for asphalt shingles all around the edges about a metre wide. The warranty for my roof is 25  years now. After all is said & done, I'm pleased beyond words. Had only the shingles been done I would have lost patches to the wind. I did read all of the one-star reviews for Niagara Roof Masters and the only thing that stood out was a complaint they didn't clean up properly afterwards. However, my crew did clean up -- thoroughly -- so I have no complaints. These guys worked hard, behaved professionally and as a result I had confidence in what they were doing. Kudos to The Home Depot who put me in touch with these guys. The Depot has a nifty service whereby you tell them your house issues and they find and contact 3 pros for solutions who are then in charge of calling you -- you don't call them. The advantage with this system is a business is vetted by The Home Depot and they encourage you to ask the business questions to vet them yourself. With the strong winds we have been getting I'm so glad my roof is done and done properly. Shout-out to Dan Bree, the Senior Home Advisor who probably saved me from getting a lot of patchwork in future years had I not learned a bit about roofing.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Dawn Riesebosch","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLH9JkonPJc-xLZhkg8DBEcoxw6d99Wwuzmq6w9YUyAHlXQbg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Craig's presentation quote is very impressive and comprehensive with detail photos and explanations. We would highly recommend JP Roofing and Construction.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKELj7tuzstNX_Sg&fid=0x0:0x9b8af7c926549798"],"When":"2025-5-14"},{"Name":"Tim MacNeil","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUpDlesH0NMiMNOWo_ijezZg97f8DaUezj8R7WLH5DnhhlLjfemIw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I enthusiastically recommend JPG Construction for roofing to anyone that asks.

Pros: Competitive price savings, 1-day job, safe and tidy job site.

Cons: Scuffed siding here and there (minor),  satellite dish 'removal' (minor because addressed by owner)

In Feb 2018 I asked JPG Construction to estimate the cost of re-roofing my house.  Jean Phillip (JP) came over the same day,  on time, and made a great impression for JPG Construction. Jean Phillip is not impatient or aggressive.  He listens to questions and answers them thoughtfully. He made helpful suggestions. Of course, I agreed to his estimate. :)

April 10 2018  Jean Phillip was on site to greet me and to see the job started. The shingle delivery was right on time.  Jean Phillips' brother was lead man of the crew.  The crew came to work exactly on time and started the job with energy and enthusiasm.  My roof was covered with workers by 8:10. The crew was mindful of safety for themselves, my family and mindful of our pets.  The job was finished in 8 hours as JP said it would be. The yard was clean.  There are some minor scuffs in the siding, I think you cannot them see from the street.  A satellite dish was thrown out in error,  I only asked to have it removed.  Jean Phillip is taking care of that for me.

My experience was very positive and I will have more work for this company in the future.  Do yourself a favor and hire this company before they are too busy!

Thank you JPG for a great job!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDEt7aCXA&fid=0x0:0x9b8af7c926549798"],"When":"2018-4-12"},{"Name":"Karl Regier","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJlUfc9zVrJ6v3UNzRLrh1MFCbxTB3Hkk5RlgmO80dPhawh6w=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"JPG did and amazing job and were in and out in a day when my tenant was away, the tenants came back and said "The new roof looks great and the crew did a hell of a clean-up job. They are amazing l have full confidence in them doing the work efficiently and good bye leak. Hallelujah!!!!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDMUtO7HNwOcVJHBjay8MJt&fid=0x0:0xc10222b33fe53aa"],"When":"2026-1-16"},{"Name":"Carolyn Odell","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWx14iDepzfhHYtBlZodTyHQY59gN-VXGM1yy-doi8ElnkTdg8W=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"After several quotes on repairs and reshingling my roof, I  stopped  looking when Roofmasters came. Not only professional yet friendly, Derek went up in both attic spaces and showed me pictures  of a concerning issue, while other companies  just walked around the roof. He was thorough, informative and patiently explained things without being pushy. Ryan came in throughout  to check on progress and completion, putting me at ease. Pricing was explained and more than fair as many sheets of plywood needed replacing. Communication is key with this company.  When they say they will be there, they are. Weather permitting,  they show up, from daily work, bin removal, flashing completion, to final check up when complete.
I can't  say enough about Kevin and his crew. Kevin was amazing, going above and beyond. His knowledge, skill and great work ethic saw the big job done beautifully and I  am thrilled. The crew efficiently cleaned up as they worked, as well as the end of each day
I can now relax and not worry the next time a wind storm  blows through !
Thank you to the Team at Roofmaster!             I highly recommend  you to everyone!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD21Gz1AiZ5ZhFZUSA3ex3X&fid=0x0:0xc10222b33fe53aa"],"When":"2025-9-16"},{"Name":"spruce","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKmFl_YZw9kw4_vjjP5jFXJoXY11R1miSEJd2dzOFeSjocuDw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Reply: The debris has already been cleaned up, but your offer is appreciated. Just wanted to make people aware to avoid this in the future.

This is about the company's negligence towards others' safety, respect for others' property, and work clean up. A neighbour hired this company to do their roof. As these pictures show, on my property, we found;
- random loose nails,
- roofing tile pieces,
- a roofing tile with 2 nails sticking up,
- a row of 10 brad nails that we almost wouldn't have found, or could've stepped on if they didn't shine in the light
- a piece of clear plastic wrap
- it appears that a worker stuffed Timberline packaging under my fence where there's a small opening

A large part of this disregard for others' safety and property was when a worker from this company was up on the neighbour's roof, blowing the garbage/debris away with a leaf blower, which fell onto my property.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAM1-eNftP_nWDbgLaFWUcW&fid=0x0:0xc10222b33fe53aa"],"When":"2025-10-21"},{"Name":"Neal Cockshutt","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKU_7fNQrxU7r41yv8KHwSusWfJeI9fuVL6ziqu7ur8TZy-Qw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Terrible to deal with. [{"Name":"Mathew Ewings","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJFxiIJ6Mnj-TpnLZlVDBssyNgL5a2zhfeE_3RUkzCJOBVzPw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"This review reflects my experience with attempting to get an estimate from this company. I ultimately decided not to use them, but felt my experience should be shared.

It took me two months of back-and-forth emails with the owner/operator to get an estimate. This delay wasn't due to re-scheduling or picking a date that was far out. It was due to the owner/operator seemingly being incapable of scheduling anything.

Every message went unanswered until I prompted again. There was a span from 5 days up to 3 weeks between replies. Every email that I sent indicated that I wanted an estimate and wanted to schedule something. Responses ranged from "...we have been extremely busy" to "..that job could be $1500-$2000. To get proper estimate need measurements." A response like that isn't very helpful. The whole point of me reaching out is to get an estimate. The second-last email said that estimates were about 2 weeks out for scheduling. I asked to set up a time and could make myself available and received no response for over three weeks.

When he finally did respond, he assumed that I lived in St. Catharines for some reason and said he would swing by since he was in the area. I corrected him that I live in Fort Erie, and he finally showed up the next day for an estimate.

I waited a week to get a written estimate as I wasn't home when he showed up. I never received anything and finally decided to go with someone else.

I understand that it was a small job and maybe he wasn't keen on taking it on, but just say that then. However, if this is what communication is like with all customers, I would not recommend using this company.

Again, I can't speak to the quality of their roofing/siding work; only to their communication skills.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Katherine Bertin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKl11M7sRkeW4n_x3lZyNIoZNS4LBxvvQyM6bIE-C38hb1WJg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Brad and the guys worked really hard! [{"Name":"Meghann Morse","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIGTEOm9cL3Pv4RF6RVsXQT64c6dI1fcU-PAXwv_D_XW0YMtg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I'm writing this review for my elderly aunt to go along with the one above as a follow-up. After weeks of Mr Marino giving excuse after excuse he finally sent his guys out to put the rubber torched on roofing on her home. They were there all day, Mr Marino stopped in briefly to drop off supplies. The next day the roof was STILL leaking so I went up there myself and took pictures. None of the vents or flashings were sealed and at least 80% of the seams are gaping wide open. I sent the pictures to Mr Marino who admits in text message that the seams are all wide open and the flashings and vents need to be sealed and promised to be out the next day (Friday) to fix the mess. Instead I received a phone call from his lawyer trying to bully me into taking down the poor review.  My attorney spoke with his attorney and said the review was indeed warrented and I would be a fool to remove it before the work was completed according to the contract.
